use_cases: Displaying success, warning, or error messages to users in web applications
Dismissible notification banners for system alerts or user confirmations
Status updates with optional action buttons for user engagement
Inline alerts in dashboards, forms, or settings pages
Confirmation messages for completed user actions
ai_summary: A reusable alert banner component with multiple variants (success, destructive, warning, default) featuring built-in status icons, dismiss functionality, and optional primary/secondary action buttons. Built with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion, following shadcn design patterns for a clean, accessible notification system.
